subcodes.first_line: The time hath come when the venom of separation shall be transformed into the honey of reunion, and the fires of remoteness shall be changed into the life-giving waters of nearness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقت آمد که مهد سم فراقرا بشهد وصال تبدیل نماید و نیر ان بعد را بکوثر حیوان قرب
